title: Error Handling Strategies Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on software error handling patterns.

questions.question: Regarding the development of software, what is an 'Error Handling Strategy' used for?
options: To identify and fix errors or 'bugs' as they occur in your application's code

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a error-handling-strategy workflow?
options: Using 'try/catch' blocks to correctly handle exceptions at each line of code
Recording a commit directly to the SQL database
Its only possible for SQL repositories
